reason: Re-stated 2026-07-12 for the Go port: the 'framework body' the original statement called hotam_spec.* is now the Go framework packages (internal/* and cmd/hotam). It is shared infrastructure any agent's code may import and is owned by no single agent -- ownership is a governance convention, not a per-agent claim. The assumption HOLDS unchanged in essence; only the package identifier was a Python-ism, now corrected to the Go packages.
